caption: A man with a tall, stylized silver-blonde hairstyle, glasses, and headphones is seated in a podcast studio. He is wearing a white shirt, a red bow tie, and light-colored suspenders. He sits before a professional black microphone on a stand. In the background, another person with a pink hairstyle and a green dress stands partially visible. The walls are decorated with a framed picture of a face and a framed yellow shield logo. On-screen text includes the logo "BOSS TALK PODCAST" and the phrase "BOSS TALK 101." Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his right hand. He begins by raising his hand near his face to emphasize a point and then slowly lowers his arm back down toward the table. The camera remains static, capturing his upper body and the immediate studio environment.
